summary: Attendance Calendar and Admin Sync Users Features - All tests passed. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend UI: All features validated through Playwright.

attendance_calendar_endpoint.details: GET /api/hr/attendance/calendar returns calendar data with employees, days, and leave statuses. Response includes month, year, month_name, total_days, employees array, countries array, and legend.

attendance_calendar_employee_structure.details: Each employee has employee_id, employee_name, employee_code, email, photo_url, weekly_off_day, days object, and summary with working_days, leave_approved, leave_pending, holidays, total_days.

attendance_calendar_day_structure.details: Each day has date, day, weekday, weekday_name, status (working/holiday/leave_approved/leave_pending), leave_type, is_weekend, leave_id, reason.

attendance_calendar_legend.details: Legend includes working (#10B981), holiday (#94A3B8), leave_approved (#3B82F6), leave_pending (#F59E0B) with color codes and labels.

attendance_calendar_country_filter.details: Country filter works - can filter employees by country_id parameter.

attendance_calendar_search_filter.details: Search filter works - searches by name, email, or employee_code. Searching 'John' returns only John Sales.

attendance_calendar_rbac.details: RBAC enforced - CEO and HR_MANAGER can access, regular users (SALES_EXECUTIVE) get 403 Forbidden.

sync_users_endpoint.details: POST /api/admin/sync-users adds missing users without deleting existing ones. Returns created_count, created_users, skipped_count, skipped_users.

sync_users_idempotent.details: Running sync twice doesn't create duplicates - second run skips all users that already exist.

sync_users_preserves_data.details: Sync is non-destructive - user count never decreases after sync.

sync_users_required_users.details: Sync ensures required users exist: kalyan@wisedrive.com (CEO), hr@wisedrive.com (HR Manager), finance@wisedrive.com (Finance Manager), john.sales@wisedrive.com (Sales), mike.mechanic@wisedrive.com (Mechanic).

login_flow.details: Login flow works - select country (India), enter email/password, click Sign In. HR Manager (hr@wisedrive.com/password123) and CEO (kalyan@wisedrive.com/password123) can login.

attendance_calendar_ui.details: UI shows calendar grid with employee list, day columns (1-28 for Feb), color-coded status cells, legend, filters (search, country, month, year), and summary column.

attendance_calendar_ui_filters.details: All UI filters work: search employee (data-testid='search-employee'), country filter (data-testid='filter-country'), month dropdown, year dropdown, refresh button (data-testid='refresh-btn').

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 5 employees from sync-users endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attendance Calendar feature fully tested. Key points: 1) GET /api/hr/attendance/calendar returns consolidated calendar view with all employees and their leave status for each day, 2) POST /api/admin/sync-users is safe for production - only adds missing users, never deletes, 3) UI shows calendar grid with color-coded status (green=working, gray=weekend, blue=approved leave, yellow=pending leave), 4) All filters work (search, country, month, year), 5) RBAC enforced - only CEO/HR_MANAGER can access calendar.
